source_pr.title: planner: build plan for CTE
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: wjhuang2016 <huangwenjun1997@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Build logical plan and physical plans for CTE, and forbid illegal usage.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/24147

- Add two logical plans: LogicalCTE and LogicalCTETable.
- Add two physical plans:  PhysicalCTE and PhysicalCTETable
- Build the plan for CTE.

Limit support will be added in the following PR.

### Related changes


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
Other tests are in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/24907

Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

CI failure logs/repro are needed to attribute any intermittent behavior to a specific root cause.
